Metadata.title: ARBC — The Shift Makers
Metadata.description: Strategy, design, video and digital development agency.

Home.b1_p1: ARBC AGENCY accompanies organizations that refuse the status quo.
Home.b2_main: move the lines of your market
Home.b3_sub: that propels your organization to new heights.

s1.label: 01 — Brand Presentation
s1.title:
Presentation
De la marque
body: BETMOMO is a pan-African digital entertainment player, specialising in online sports betting.
Present across several African countries, the brand has established itself as a reference through a secure platform and a fluid user experience.
body2: BETMOMO offers its community total gaming flexibility through a complete digital ecosystem: a high-performance web portal and a mobile application optimised for iOS and Android.

s2.label: 02 — The Challenge
s2.title:
The Agency's
Challenge
body: Supporting the deployment of BETMOMO across the African market, with a focus on Côte d'Ivoire and Cameroon. The primary objective was to go beyond simple communication and anchor the brand as a lasting reference in the sports betting sector.

s3.label: 03 — Our Response
col1_body: Deployment of street marketing campaigns (in-store and street activations) to drive direct recruitment of new bettors and build grassroots brand awareness in popular neighbourhoods across Cameroon and Côte d'Ivoire.
col2_body: Supervision of the graphic pipeline and production of visuals and advertising spots (TV/Radio/Digital). The objective was to build a strong, memorable visual identity capable of adapting to local cultural codes while respecting BetMomo's brand image.
col3_body: Organisation of key brand moments (launch evenings, bettor tournaments, sponsorship events) aimed at building an active community around the brand and establishing trust with local partners.

s4.label: Results
r1_body: A significant increase in new users and app downloads.
r2_body: The broadcast of advertising spots generated an immediate impact, significantly increasing brand recognition among the betting community.
r3_body: Thousands of direct contacts established through brand ambassadors, fostering increased user loyalty.

s1.label: 01 — Brand Presentation
s1.title: Brand Presentation
body: Established in Central Africa since 2016, Accent Media Group has established itself as a key player in the digital transformation on the continent.
Initially recognized for its expertise in advertising sales, the group has undergone a strategic transformation to meet the new challenges of the market.
sub: Two entities, one vision: AMTech handles the technical infrastructure while AMP drives the media strategy.
s1.entities_intro: This mutation led to the creation of two distinct and specialised entities:
s1.e1_desc: Specialist in digital transformation for businesses.
s1.e2_desc: Focused on urban space development through the deployment of merchant kiosks.

s2.label: 02 — The Challenge
s2.title: The agency's challenge
body: Officially announce the internal restructuring of ACCENT MEDIA and its split into two separate entities, while promoting the specific service offering of each new structure to its respective customer segments.

s3.label: 03 — The agency's response
col1_body: Proposal of two distinct visual identities for each of the new entities AMT and AMP.
col2_body: Development of a simplified service catalogue for AMT, replacing technical jargon with concrete client benefits — making the company's expertise immediately understandable.
col3_body: Deployment of an editorial line focused on advisory content and knowledge sharing for AMT and AMP — sales-oriented for AMP, advisory and educational for AMT.

s4.label: Results
r1_body: Elimination of all confusion among prospects and partners.
r2_body: The clarification and targeted promotion strategy for each area of expertise improved public understanding of the offer. This drove growth in direct kiosk orders and a strong flow of digital transformation enquiries.
r3_body: The deployment of social media activations generated a significant increase in engagement, humanising the brand among its target audiences.

p01.title: In the digital age, everyone talks. But who is really being listened to?
descriptions: Borders have disappeared, and in African markets, as elsewhere, competition has become global, intense, and immediate. Your customers are overwhelmed by thousands of offers every day.

p02.title: Woodin — weaving digital into the DNA of an iconic brand.
descriptions: What makes the difference today is not volume… but the ability to understand your market, anticipate its dynamics and respond to them with creativity and precision.
taglines: Those who emerge don't shout any louder.
They are changing the game and gaining a significant advantage.

p03.title: Le Lagon Club — a premium experience, from first glance to last sip.
descriptions: Building the visual universe of a high-end club means translating a luxury promise into every pixel, every print, every moment.
Visual identity, communication materials and content strategy for a discerning clientele.
taglines: For you, we create ideas that challenges <b><span style="font-size: var(--text-md); line-height: 1; font-style: italic;"> conventions, captivate audiences, and resonate with African realities.
Because today, communication is no longer enough. We need to have a <b><span style="font-size: var(--text-sm); line-height: 1; font-style: italic;"> lasting impact.

p04.title: H-Choice — guiding every choice toward the right decision.
descriptions: A guidance platform designed to simplify complex decisions in a market saturated with options.
User-centred UX design, clear information architecture and optimised conversion flows.

p05.title: Spicy — the flavour of a brand that dares.
descriptions: Spicy claims the difference. Our work: build a brand identity as punchy as its name — bold, consistent, unforgettable.
From naming to design system, through to digital editorial strategy.
taglines: To spice things up is to stand out.

p06.title: Accent Media — amplifying every message, reaching every audience.
descriptions: Supporting a media agency through its digital transformation with communication tools that reflect its premium positioning.
Content strategy, editorial redesign and high-definition commercial production.
taglines: The right message, at the right time.

p07.title: Cimencam — building trust as much as structures.
descriptions: For a major player in the construction sector, institutional communication must inspire as much as it informs.
Annual reports, corporate materials and B2B campaigns designed to reinforce the credibility of an industrial leader.
taglines: To build is also to tell a story.
